title: Technology Briefing: Clear your calendar, Drupal user: You have a critically urgent patch to install
summary: Leo Stone turns the latest technology headlines into an operator's view of platforms, infrastructure, and product strategy.
imageAlt: Image from source article for Microsoft storms RAMPART, adds Clarity to agentic AI safety
imageCaption: Microsoft storms RAMPART, adds Clarity to agentic AI safety
imageSourceTitle: Microsoft storms RAMPART, adds Clarity to agentic AI safety

body.text: The useful way to read technology news is to ask what changes for builders and operators: platform control, infrastructure cost, data boundaries, security exposure, and product leverage.

items: Clear your calendar, Drupal user: You have a critically urgent patch to install
Anthropic butts in to small business, promises help with payroll and other core tasks
EU browser choice rules send millions more users Firefox's way
Anthropic’s bug-hunting Mythos was greatest marketing stunt ever, says cURL creator
Microsoft storms RAMPART, adds Clarity to agentic AI safety

body.text: The first-order story is rarely enough. A professional reading asks whether the news changes deployment risk, developer behavior, enterprise buying cycles, cloud economics, or the trust boundary around automation.
The strongest technical teams will treat these signals as prompts for better architecture decisions, not as reasons to chase every fashionable tool.
